ksa_text: Knowledge of data mesh principles and federated data ownership models, including the role of data product thinking, domain ownership boundaries, platform infrastructure, and self-service analytics within decentralized data architectures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Executive Data Steward scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("data ownership", "data   :principle|value|belief|ethic", "data   :monetiz|valuation|product|asset management"). STRM composite is moderate-to-strong (0.4188). Domain Data Quality (affinity 0.72) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for senior IC level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in governance job postings or certification curricula (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP CIPP/CIPM, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Would a working Executive Data Steward self-report this as a required competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the governance competency is implicit in Executive Data Steward practice (domain affinity 0.72, 3 GOV signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate governance competencies.
